description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled hip roof covered in dark gray shingles. The front facade features a prominent covered balcony above the main entryway, supported by columns, and is flanked by large bay windows. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of green siding and light gray foundation, with white window frames providing contrast. On one side, there is an attached two-car garage with a flat roof and a driveway area, while the opposite side features a smaller extension with additional windows. The rear of the house includes a secondary balcony and more windows, suggesting spacious interior living areas. The overall design blends traditional and modern suburban architectural elements, making it suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a multi-gabled hip roof, large bay windows, a covered balcony entry, and an attached garage. The exterior features green siding, gray foundation, and white-trimmed windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered balcony, large bay windows, and the attached garage on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the roof structure and several smaller windows on the green siding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary balcony, additional windows, and the back extension of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the garage extension, flat roof, and more windows visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large bay windows and grouped sets
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entry with balcony above, supported by columns, steps leading to the main door, and decorative railings
